command: Write-Output '=== ALL PNP DEVICES WITH ew43 OR bluetooth OR audio ===' ; Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.FriendlyName -match 'ew43|bluetooth|audio|headphone|headset|speaker|earphone|earbuds|爻賲丕毓丞' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize ; Write-Output '=== BLUETOOTH PAIRED DEVICES REGISTRY ===' ; $btPath = 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\BTHPORT\Parameters\Devices' ; if (Test-Path $btPath) { Get-ChildItem $btPath | ForEach-Object { $name = (Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -Name 'Name' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Name; if($name) { [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($name) } else { $_.PSChildName } } } else { Write-Output 'Registry path not found' } ; Write-Output '=== SOUND DEVICES (Win32_SoundDevice) ===' ; Get-CimInstance Win32_SoundDevice | Format-Table Name, Status, Manufacturer -AutoSize
description: 鬲丨賯賷賯 2: 亘丨孬 卮丕賲賱 毓賳 ew43 賮賷 賰賱 丕賱兀噩賴夭丞 + 爻噩賱 丕賱兀噩賴夭丞 丕賱賲賯鬲乇賳丞 + 兀噩賴夭丞 丕賱氐賵鬲
